entries.t: abbr. keyed video generator 键控视频发生器

entries.d:
Epitomising the musical ideals of sub-underground black metal - the kind of stuff that comes out in limited editions of 300 through vinyl-only labels based in a cave in Belarus. The exact requirements of kvltness vary depending on who you talk to, but usually involve icy, impenetrable production, black-and-white cover art, and concepts drawn from black magic, pagan myths or out-and-out nihilism.\r
\r
Like anyone who takes art seriously these days, kvltists are the target of much mockery even from fellow extreme metal fans.
> "This new Nattefrost album is kvlt as fuck!"
> "stfu".

entries.t: abbr. 基于内核的虚拟机（K Virtual Machine）
